utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And why do you care so much ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Because ! You could get to live out my fantasy !

emotion_cause.span: 2_You could get to live out my fantasy !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No ! You know , the fantasy ! Meet someone from a strange land , fall in madly love , and spend the rest of your lives together .

emotion_cause.span: 4_the fantasy ! Meet someone from a strange land , fall in madly love , and spend the rest of your lives together .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Is that why in junior high you were the only one that hung out with that Ukrainian kid ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_Is that why in junior high you were the only one that hung out with that Ukrainian kid ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah that , plus his mom used to put sour cream on everything !

emotion_cause.span: 6_his mom used to put sour cream on everything !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: We said it was only going to be two weeks , you know ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ohhh , I knew you loved her ! Then you need to go to the airport and tell her . You’ll probably catch her just as she’s about to go to the gate . You’re gonna call out her name and yell " I love you ! " She’s gonna say " I love you , too ! " And you guys are going to have the most amazing kiss . Everyone at the gate will applaud .

emotion_cause.span: 11_You’ll probably catch her just as she’s about to go to the gate . You’re gonna call out her name and yell " I love you ! " She’s gonna say " I love you , too ! " And you guys are going to have the most amazing kiss . Everyone at the gate will applaud .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Then you two can , can sneak into the cockpit , and things will start to heat up , and then a stewardess comes in ... I have been watching too much porn .
